generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a senior citizen who remembers the Cold War, I worry about our alliances. Did you know that NATO members are still not meeting their defense spending commitments? We can't rely on others to protect us. Our tax dollars should go to strengthening our own defenses first. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
